title: Vilwadrinatha Temple
tagline: Vilwadrinatha Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: The Vilwadrinatha Temple is a Hindu temple in Thiruvilwamala, a town in the city of Thrissur, Kerala, India.
overview.description: The Vilwadrinatha Temple is a Hindu temple in Thiruvilwamala, a town in the city of Thrissur, Kerala, India. The principal deities are Rama, the seventh incarnation of the god Vishnu, and his brother, Lakshmana. It figures among the Abhimana Kshetrams in Vaishnavite traditions. This is one of the four major Rama temples in Kerala – the other three are in Thriprayar, Kadavallur, and Thiruvangad.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvilwamala
topPlaces.description: Thiruvilwamala is a hilly village in the northern region of Thrissur district, in the state of Kerala, southern India. It is located 47 kilometres northeast of district headquarters Thrissur.

topPlaces.name: Mankara
topPlaces.description: Mankara is a village and gram panchayat in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Lakkidi, Palakkad
topPlaces.description: Lakkidi or Lakkidi Perur is a small village in Ottapalam Taluk of Palakkad district, Kerala, India. It is located 23 km west of Palakkad on the Palakkad - Pattambi Road.

topPlaces.name: Killikkurussi Shiva temple
topPlaces.description: Killikkurussi Shiva temple or Killikkurussi Mahadeva temple or "Killikkurussimangalam Shiva temple" is a Siva temple situated at Killikkurussi in the neighbourhood of Lakkidi, Palakkad, Kerala in India. This temple is dedicated to Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Killikkurussimangalam
topPlaces.description: Killikkurussimangalam (also known as Lakkidi) is a village around 8 km from nearby town Ottappalam in Palakkad district of Kerala, south India. The river Nila (Bharatapuzha) flows through the southern border of Lakkidi.

topPlaces.name: Kendriya Vidyalaya, Ottapalam
topPlaces.description: PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya, Kerala is a school in Ottapalam, Kerala, India which offers education. Founded in 1986 with the support of Sri K. R. Narayanan, then member of parliament from Ottapalam.

topPlaces.name: Kaniyarkode
topPlaces.description: Kaniyarkode is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Chinakkathoor Temple
topPlaces.description: Chinakkathoor Bhagavathi Temple is a Hindu temple located at Palappuram near Ottapalam in Palakkad district of Kerala, India. The temple is well-known for the Chinakkathoor pooram held annually in the Malayalam month of Kumbham.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vilwadrinatha Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vilwadrinatha Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vilwadrinatha Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (66 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (65 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vilwadrinatha Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vilwadrinatha Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vilwadrinatha Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vilwadrinatha Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vilwadrinatha Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thiruvilwamala, Mankara, Lakkidi, Palakkad, Killikkurussi Shiva temple, Killikkurussimangalam.
